AJAMAGHOULIGAN-SEPULCHRE_PILE.title: Sepulchre Pile
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-SEPULCHRE_PILE.descriptio:
Haunted cards are automatically played from here at the start of your turn.

Click to view cards in your sepulchre pile.
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-HAUNT.title: Haunt
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-BURY.title: Bury
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-BURY.description: Put the specified amount of cards into your [gold]Sepulchre Pile[/gold].
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-DISINTER.title: Disinter
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-DISINTER.description: Put the specified amount of cards from your [gold]Sepulchre Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
